_meta.description: This file contains a serialized version of schema entities for drift.

columns.name: category_id
columns.defaultConstraints: REFERENCES categories (id) ON DELETE SET NULL

dialectAwareDefaultConstraints.sqlite: REFERENCES categories (id) ON DELETE SET NULL

columns.name: customer_id
columns.defaultConstraints: REFERENCES customers (id) ON DELETE SET NULL

dialectAwareDefaultConstraints.sqlite: REFERENCES customers (id) ON DELETE SET NULL

columns.name: customer_id
columns.defaultConstraints: REFERENCES customers (id) ON DELETE SET NULL

dialectAwareDefaultConstraints.sqlite: REFERENCES customers (id) ON DELETE SET NULL

columns.name: supplier_id
columns.defaultConstraints: REFERENCES suppliers (id) ON DELETE SET NULL

dialectAwareDefaultConstraints.sqlite: REFERENCES suppliers (id) ON DELETE SET NULL

sql.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "stores" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "org_id" TEXT NULL, "name" TEXT NOT NULL, "name_en" TEXT NULL, "phone" TEXT NULL, "email" TEXT NULL, "address" TEXT NULL, "city" TEXT NULL, "logo" TEXT NULL, "tax_number" TEXT NULL, "commercial_reg" TEXT NULL, "currency" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'SAR', "timezone" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'Asia/Riyadh', "is_active" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1 CHECK ("is_active" IN (0, 1)), "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "updated_at" INTEGER NULL, "synced_at" INTEGER NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "categories" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "org_id" TEXT NULL, "store_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES stores (id), "name" TEXT NOT NULL, "name_en" TEXT NULL, "parent_id" TEXT NULL REFERENCES categories (id), "image_url" TEXT NULL, "color" TEXT NULL, "icon" TEXT NULL, "sort_order" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "is_active" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1 CHECK ("is_active" IN (0, 1)), "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "updated_at" INTEGER NULL, "synced_at" INTEGER NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "products" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "org_id" TEXT NULL, "store_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES stores (id) ON DELETE RESTRICT, "name" TEXT NOT NULL, "sku" TEXT NULL, "barcode" TEXT NULL, "price" REAL NOT NULL, "cost_price" REAL NULL, "stock_qty" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "min_qty" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1, "unit" TEXT NULL, "description" TEXT NULL, "image_thumbnail" TEXT NULL, "image_medium" TEXT NULL, "image_large" TEXT NULL, "image_hash" TEXT NULL, "category_id" TEXT NULL REFERENCES categories (id) ON DELETE SET NULL, "is_active" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1 CHECK ("is_active" IN (0, 1)), "track_inventory" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1 CHECK ("track_inventory" IN (0, 1)), "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "updated_at" INTEGER NULL, "synced_at" INTEGER NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "users" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "org_id" TEXT NULL, "store_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "name" TEXT NOT NULL, "phone" TEXT NULL, "email" TEXT NULL, "pin" TEXT NULL, "auth_uid" TEXT NULL, "role" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'cashier', "role_id" TEXT NULL, "avatar" TEXT NULL, "is_active" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1 CHECK ("is_active" IN (0, 1)), "last_login_at" INTEGER NULL, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "updated_at" INTEGER NULL, "synced_at" INTEGER NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "customers" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "org_id" TEXT NULL, "store_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "name" TEXT NOT NULL, "phone" TEXT NULL, "email" TEXT NULL, "address" TEXT NULL, "city" TEXT NULL, "tax_number" TEXT NULL, "type" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'individual', "notes" TEXT NULL, "is_active" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1 CHECK ("is_active" IN (0, 1)), "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "updated_at" INTEGER NULL, "synced_at" INTEGER NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "sales" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "org_id" TEXT NULL, "receipt_no" TEXT NOT NULL, "store_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES stores (id) ON DELETE RESTRICT, "cashier_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES users (id) ON DELETE RESTRICT, "terminal_id" TEXT NULL, "customer_id" TEXT NULL REFERENCES customers (id) ON DELETE SET NULL, "customer_name" TEXT NULL, "customer_phone" TEXT NULL, "subtotal" REAL NOT NULL, "discount" REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.0, "tax" REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.0, "total" REAL NOT NULL, "payment_method" TEXT NOT NULL, "is_paid" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1 CHECK ("is_paid" IN (0, 1)), "amount_received" REAL NULL, "change_amount" REAL NULL, "notes" TEXT NULL, "channel" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'POS', "status" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'completed', "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "updated_at" INTEGER NULL, "synced_at" INTEGER NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "sale_items" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "sale_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES sales (id) ON DELETE CASCADE, "product_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES products (id) ON DELETE RESTRICT, "product_name" TEXT NOT NULL, "product_sku" TEXT NULL, "product_barcode" TEXT NULL, "qty" INTEGER NOT NULL, "unit_price" REAL NOT NULL, "cost_price" REAL NULL, "subtotal" REAL NOT NULL, "discount" REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.0, "total" REAL NOT NULL, "notes" TEXT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "inventory_movements" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "org_id" TEXT NULL, "product_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES products (id), "store_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES stores (id), "type" TEXT NOT NULL, "qty" INTEGER NOT NULL, "previous_qty" INTEGER NOT NULL, "new_qty" INTEGER NOT NULL, "reference_type" TEXT NULL, "reference_id" TEXT NULL, "reason" TEXT NULL, "notes" TEXT NULL, "user_id" TEXT NULL, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "synced_at" INTEGER NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "suppliers" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "org_id" TEXT NULL, "store_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "name" TEXT NOT NULL, "phone" TEXT NULL, "email" TEXT NULL, "address" TEXT NULL, "city" TEXT NULL, "tax_number" TEXT NULL, "payment_terms" TEXT NULL, "rating" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "balance" REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.0, "notes" TEXT NULL, "is_active" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1 CHECK ("is_active" IN (0, 1)), "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "updated_at" INTEGER NULL, "synced_at" INTEGER NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "accounts" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "org_id" TEXT NULL, "store_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES stores (id), "type" TEXT NOT NULL, "customer_id" TEXT NULL REFERENCES customers (id), "supplier_id" TEXT NULL REFERENCES suppliers (id), "name" TEXT NOT NULL, "phone" TEXT NULL, "balance" REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.0, "credit_limit" REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.0, "is_active" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1 CHECK ("is_active" IN (0, 1)), "last_transaction_at" INTEGER NULL, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "updated_at" INTEGER NULL, "synced_at" INTEGER NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "sync_queue" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "table_name" TEXT NOT NULL, "record_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "operation" TEXT NOT NULL, "payload" TEXT NOT NULL, "idempotency_key" TEXT NOT NULL, "status" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending', "retry_count" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "max_retries" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 3, "last_error" TEXT NULL, "priority" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "last_attempt_at" INTEGER NULL, "synced_at" INTEGER NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "transactions" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "store_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES stores (id), "account_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES accounts (id), "type" TEXT NOT NULL, "amount" REAL NOT NULL, "balance_after" REAL NOT NULL, "description" TEXT NULL, "reference_id" TEXT NULL, "reference_type" TEXT NULL, "period_key" TEXT NULL, "payment_method" TEXT NULL, "created_by" TEXT NULL, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "synced_at" INTEGER NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "orders" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "org_id" TEXT NULL, "store_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES stores (id), "customer_id" TEXT NULL REFERENCES customers (id), "order_number" TEXT NOT NULL, "channel" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'app', "status" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'created', "subtotal" REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.0, "tax_amount" REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.0, "delivery_fee" REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.0, "discount" REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.0, "total" REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.0, "payment_method" TEXT NULL, "payment_status" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending', "delivery_type" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'delivery', "delivery_address" TEXT NULL, "delivery_lat" REAL NULL, "delivery_lng" REAL NULL, "driver_id" TEXT NULL, "notes" TEXT NULL, "cancel_reason" TEXT NULL, "order_date" INTEGER NOT NULL, "confirmed_at" INTEGER NULL, "preparing_at" INTEGER NULL, "ready_at" INTEGER NULL, "delivering_at" INTEGER NULL, "delivered_at" INTEGER NULL, "cancelled_at" INTEGER NULL, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "updated_at" INTEGER NULL, "synced_at" INTEGER NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "order_items" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "order_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES orders (id) ON DELETE CASCADE, "product_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES products (id) ON DELETE RESTRICT, "product_name" TEXT NOT NULL, "product_name_en" TEXT NULL, "barcode" TEXT NULL, "quantity" REAL NOT NULL, "unit_price" REAL NOT NULL, "discount" REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.0, "tax_rate" REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 15.0, "tax_amount" REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.0, "total" REAL NOT NULL, "notes" TEXT NULL, "is_reserved" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("is_reserved" IN (0, 1)), PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "audit_log" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "org_id" TEXT NULL, "store_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "user_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "user_name" TEXT NOT NULL, "action" TEXT NOT NULL, "entity_type" TEXT NULL, "entity_id" TEXT NULL, "old_value" TEXT NULL, "new_value" TEXT NULL, "description" TEXT NULL, "ip_address" TEXT NULL, "device_info" TEXT NULL, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "synced_at" INTEGER NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "loyalty_points" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "org_id" TEXT NULL, "customer_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES customers (id), "store_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES stores (id), "current_points" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "total_earned" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "total_redeemed" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "tier_level" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'bronze', "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT (CAST(strftime('%s', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) AS INTEGER)), "updated_at" INTEGER NULL, "synced_at" INTEGER NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "loyalty_transactions" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "org_id" TEXT NULL, "loyalty_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES loyalty_points (id), "customer_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES customers (id), "store_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES stores (id), "transaction_type" TEXT NOT NULL, "points" INTEGER NOT NULL, "balance_after" INTEGER NOT NULL, "sale_id" TEXT NULL REFERENCES sales (id), "sale_amount" REAL NULL, "description" TEXT NULL, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT (CAST(strftime('%s', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) AS INTEGER)), "cashier_id" TEXT NULL REFERENCES users (id), "synced_at" INTEGER NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "loyalty_rewards" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "org_id" TEXT NULL, "store_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES stores (id), "name" TEXT NOT NULL, "description" TEXT NULL, "points_required" INTEGER NOT NULL, "reward_type" TEXT NOT NULL, "reward_value" REAL NOT NULL, "min_purchase" REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.0, "required_tier" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'all', "is_active" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1 CHECK ("is_active" IN (0, 1)), "expires_at" INTEGER NULL, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT (CAST(strftime('%s', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) AS INTEGER)), "synced_at" INTEGER NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "roles" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "store_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "name" TEXT NOT NULL, "name_en" TEXT NULL, "permissions" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}', "is_system" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("is_system" IN (0, 1)), "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "updated_at" INTEGER NULL, "synced_at" INTEGER NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "customer_addresses" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "org_id" TEXT NULL, "customer_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "label" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'home', "address" TEXT NOT NULL, "city" TEXT NULL, "lat" REAL NULL, "lng" REAL NULL, "is_default" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("is_default" IN (0, 1)), "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "shifts" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "org_id" TEXT NULL, "store_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "terminal_id" TEXT NULL, "cashier_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "cashier_name" TEXT NOT NULL, "opening_cash" REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.0, "closing_cash" REAL NULL, "expected_cash" REAL NULL, "difference" REAL NULL, "total_sales" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "total_sales_amount" REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.0, "total_refunds" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "total_refunds_amount" REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.0, "status" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'open', "notes" TEXT NULL, "opened_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "closed_at" INTEGER NULL, "synced_at" INTEGER NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "cash_movements" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "org_id" TEXT NULL, "shift_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "store_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "type" TEXT NOT NULL, "amount" REAL NOT NULL, "reason" TEXT NULL, "reference" TEXT NULL, "created_by" TEXT NULL, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "synced_at" INTEGER NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "returns" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "org_id" TEXT NULL, "return_number" TEXT NOT NULL, "sale_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES sales (id) ON DELETE RESTRICT, "store_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES stores (id) ON DELETE RESTRICT, "customer_id" TEXT NULL REFERENCES customers (id) ON DELETE SET NULL, "customer_name" TEXT NULL, "reason" TEXT NULL, "type" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'full', "refund_method" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'cash', "total_refund" REAL NOT NULL, "status" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'completed', "created_by" TEXT NULL, "notes" TEXT NULL, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "synced_at" INTEGER NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "return_items" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "org_id" TEXT NULL, "return_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES returns (id) ON DELETE CASCADE, "sale_item_id" TEXT NULL, "product_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES products (id) ON DELETE RESTRICT, "product_name" TEXT NOT NULL, "qty" INTEGER NOT NULL, "unit_price" REAL NOT NULL, "refund_amount" REAL NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "expenses" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "org_id" TEXT NULL, "store_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "category_id" TEXT NULL, "amount" REAL NOT NULL, "description" TEXT NULL, "payment_method" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'cash', "receipt_image" TEXT NULL, "created_by" TEXT NULL, "expense_date" INTEGER NOT NULL, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "updated_at" INTEGER NULL, "synced_at" INTEGER NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "expense_categories" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "org_id" TEXT NULL, "store_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "name" TEXT NOT NULL, "name_en" TEXT NULL, "icon" TEXT NULL, "color" TEXT NULL, "is_active" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1 CHECK ("is_active" IN (0, 1)), "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "synced_at" INTEGER NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "purchases" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "org_id" TEXT NULL, "store_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES stores (id) ON DELETE RESTRICT, "supplier_id" TEXT NULL REFERENCES suppliers (id) ON DELETE SET NULL, "supplier_name" TEXT NULL, "purchase_number" TEXT NOT NULL, "status" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'draft', "subtotal" REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.0, "tax" REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.0, "discount" REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.0, "total" REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.0, "payment_status" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending', "payment_method" TEXT NULL, "notes" TEXT NULL, "received_at" INTEGER NULL, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "updated_at" INTEGER NULL, "synced_at" INTEGER NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "purchase_items" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "org_id" TEXT NULL, "purchase_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES purchases (id) ON DELETE CASCADE, "product_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES products (id) ON DELETE RESTRICT, "product_name" TEXT NOT NULL, "product_barcode" TEXT NULL, "qty" INTEGER NOT NULL, "received_qty" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "unit_cost" REAL NOT NULL, "total" REAL NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "discounts" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "org_id" TEXT NULL, "store_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "name" TEXT NOT NULL, "name_en" TEXT NULL, "type" TEXT NOT NULL, "value" REAL NOT NULL, "min_purchase" REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.0, "max_discount" REAL NULL, "applies_to" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'all', "product_ids" TEXT NULL, "category_ids" TEXT NULL, "start_date" INTEGER NULL, "end_date" INTEGER NULL, "is_active" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1 CHECK ("is_active" IN (0, 1)), "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "updated_at" INTEGER NULL, "synced_at" INTEGER NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "coupons" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "org_id" TEXT NULL, "store_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "code" TEXT NOT NULL, "discount_id" TEXT NULL, "type" TEXT NOT NULL, "value" REAL NOT NULL, "max_uses" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "current_uses" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "min_purchase" REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.0, "is_active" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1 CHECK ("is_active" IN (0, 1)), "expires_at" INTEGER NULL, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "synced_at" INTEGER NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "promotions" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "org_id" TEXT NULL, "store_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "name" TEXT NOT NULL, "name_en" TEXT NULL, "description" TEXT NULL, "type" TEXT NOT NULL, "rules" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}', "start_date" INTEGER NOT NULL, "end_date" INTEGER NOT NULL, "is_active" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1 CHECK ("is_active" IN (0, 1)), "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "updated_at" INTEGER NULL, "synced_at" INTEGER NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "held_invoices" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "store_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "cashier_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "customer_name" TEXT NULL, "customer_phone" TEXT NULL, "items" TEXT NOT NULL, "subtotal" REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.0, "discount" REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.0, "total" REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.0, "notes" TEXT NULL, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "notifications" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "org_id" TEXT NULL, "store_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "user_id" TEXT NULL, "title" TEXT NOT NULL, "body" TEXT NOT NULL, "type" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'info', "is_read" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("is_read" IN (0, 1)), "data" TEXT NULL, "action_url" TEXT NULL, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "read_at" INTEGER NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "stock_transfers" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "transfer_number" TEXT NOT NULL, "from_store_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "to_store_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "status" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending', "items" TEXT NOT NULL, "notes" TEXT NULL, "created_by" TEXT NULL, "approved_by" TEXT NULL, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "approved_at" INTEGER NULL, "completed_at" INTEGER NULL, "synced_at" INTEGER NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "settings" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "store_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "key" TEXT NOT NULL, "value" TEXT NOT NULL, "updated_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "stock_takes" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "store_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "name" TEXT NOT NULL, "status" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'in_progress', "items" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]', "total_items" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "counted_items" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "variance_items" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "notes" TEXT NULL, "created_by" TEXT NULL, "started_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "completed_at" INTEGER NULL, "synced_at" INTEGER NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "product_expiry" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "product_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "store_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "batch_number" TEXT NULL, "expiry_date" INTEGER NOT NULL, "quantity" INTEGER NOT NULL, "notes" TEXT NULL, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "synced_at" INTEGER NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "drivers" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "store_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "name" TEXT NOT NULL, "phone" TEXT NULL, "vehicle_type" TEXT NULL, "vehicle_plate" TEXT NULL, "status" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'available', "is_active" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1 CHECK ("is_active" IN (0, 1)), "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "updated_at" INTEGER NULL, "synced_at" INTEGER NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "daily_summaries" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "org_id" TEXT NULL, "store_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "date" INTEGER NOT NULL, "total_sales" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "total_sales_amount" REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.0, "total_orders" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "total_orders_amount" REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.0, "total_refunds" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "total_refunds_amount" REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.0, "total_expenses" REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.0, "cash_total" REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.0, "card_total" REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.0, "credit_total" REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.0, "net_profit" REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.0, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "updated_at" INTEGER NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "order_status_history" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "order_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "from_status" TEXT NULL, "to_status" TEXT NOT NULL, "changed_by" TEXT NULL, "notes" TEXT NULL, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "favorites" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "store_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "product_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "sort_order" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "whatsapp_messages" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "store_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "phone" TEXT NOT NULL, "customer_name" TEXT NULL, "customer_id" TEXT NULL, "message_type" TEXT NOT NULL, "text_content" TEXT NULL, "media_url" TEXT NULL, "media_local_path" TEXT NULL, "file_name" TEXT NULL, "template_id" TEXT NULL, "reference_type" TEXT NULL, "reference_id" TEXT NULL, "status" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending', "external_msg_id" TEXT NULL, "retry_count" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "max_retries" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 3, "last_error" TEXT NULL, "priority" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 2, "batch_id" TEXT NULL, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "sent_at" INTEGER NULL, "delivered_at" INTEGER NULL, "read_at" INTEGER NULL, "last_attempt_at" INTEGER NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "whatsapp_templates" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "store_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "name" TEXT NOT NULL, "type" TEXT NOT NULL, "content" TEXT NOT NULL, "language" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'ar', "is_active" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1 CHECK ("is_active" IN (0, 1)), "is_default" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("is_default" IN (0, 1)), "media_type" TEXT NULL, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "updated_at" INTEGER NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "organizations" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "name" TEXT NOT NULL, "name_en" TEXT NULL, "slug" TEXT NULL, "logo" TEXT NULL, "owner_id" TEXT NULL, "phone" TEXT NULL, "email" TEXT NULL, "address" TEXT NULL, "city" TEXT NULL, "country" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'SA', "tax_number" TEXT NULL, "commercial_reg" TEXT NULL, "currency" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'SAR', "timezone" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'Asia/Riyadh', "locale" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'ar', "plan" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'free', "max_stores" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1, "max_users" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 3, "max_products" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 100, "is_active" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1 CHECK ("is_active" IN (0, 1)), "trial_ends_at" INTEGER NULL, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "updated_at" INTEGER NULL, "synced_at" INTEGER NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "subscriptions" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "org_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "plan" TEXT NOT NULL, "status" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active', "amount" REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.0, "currency" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'SAR', "billing_cycle" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'monthly', "current_period_start" INTEGER NOT NULL, "current_period_end" INTEGER NOT NULL, "cancel_at_period_end" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("cancel_at_period_end" IN (0, 1)), "payment_method" TEXT NULL, "external_subscription_id" TEXT NULL, "features" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}', "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "updated_at" INTEGER NULL, "synced_at" INTEGER NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "org_members" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "org_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "user_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "role" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'staff', "is_active" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1 CHECK ("is_active" IN (0, 1)), "invited_by" TEXT NULL, "invited_at" INTEGER NULL, "joined_at" INTEGER NULL, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "updated_at" INTEGER NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "user_stores" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "user_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "store_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "role" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'cashier', "is_primary" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("is_primary" IN (0, 1)), "is_active" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1 CHECK ("is_active" IN (0, 1)), "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "updated_at" INTEGER NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "pos_terminals" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "store_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "org_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "name" TEXT NOT NULL, "terminal_number" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1, "device_id" TEXT NULL, "device_name" TEXT NULL, "device_model" TEXT NULL, "os_version" TEXT NULL, "app_version" TEXT NULL, "status" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active', "current_shift_id" TEXT NULL, "current_user_id" TEXT NULL, "last_heartbeat_at" INTEGER NULL, "last_sync_at" INTEGER NULL, "settings" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}', "receipt_header" TEXT NULL, "receipt_footer" TEXT NULL, "is_active" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1 CHECK ("is_active" IN (0, 1)), "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "updated_at" INTEGER NULL, "synced_at" INTEGER NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "sync_metadata" ("table_name" TEXT NOT NULL, "last_pull_at" INTEGER NULL, "last_push_at" INTEGER NULL, "pending_count" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "failed_count" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "is_initial_synced" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("is_initial_synced" IN (0, 1)), "last_sync_count" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "last_error" TEXT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("table_name"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "stock_deltas" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "product_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "store_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "org_id" TEXT NULL, "quantity_change" INTEGER NOT NULL, "device_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "operation_type" TEXT NOT NULL, "reference_id" TEXT NULL, "sync_status" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending', "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "synced_at" INTEGER NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));
CREATE INDEX idx_sales_store_created ON sales (store_id, created_at)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_sales_store_receipt_unique ON sales (store_id, receipt_no)
